name: Pixel-Purge: Metadata Forensic Scrubber
description: Industrial-grade privacy utility. Instantly strip GPS coordinates, device IDs, and EXIF metadata from project uploads. Re-forge your images pixel-by-pixel to eliminate hidden digital fingerprints. Local-first deployment.

name: Session-Shield: Link Isolation Node
description: Industrial link-sanitization engine. Neutralize session-hijacking scripts and phishing attempts from Fiverr, LinkedIn, and social media before they touch your browser. Features 200ms headless ping and redirect trace logic.

name: Global Forge-Guard: Forensic Link Auditor
description: Industrial browser perimeter for freelancers. Real-time link auditing across Fiverr, LinkedIn, and social media. Features an automated global threat-sync with our community-driven forensic database. Stop phishing at the source.

name: Shadow Merge: Industrial File Hider
description: Raw binary file-hiding utility. Hide sensitive folders or files inside standard images locally. No cloud, no AI—just pure logic. Includes standalone HTML UI for browser-based forging.

name: Vertical Web Builder: Industrial Shell
description: The 'Vibrant Dark' developer cockpit. A local-first, high-fidelity UI shell and Hono.js backend bridge. Built for speed, security, and Gemini 2.5 Flash refactoring. Own your engine.

name: The Bootstrap Blueprint: Entrepreneur's Guide
description: The pure Dart + Gemini intelligence core. Move from 'idea' to 'revenue' with real-time AI guidance. No UI bloat, just a sovereign engine for the no-money entrepreneur.

name: Aurora AI (Full Ownership)
description: Full IP rights for Aurora AI: Forensic Vehicle Intelligence. As seen on IndieMaker & SideProjector. High-fidelity generative engine ready for enterprise integration.

name: Hono Guardian Node
description: Edge-native account protection. A Hono-based security proxy with optional AI threat-analysis to guard high-value social media assets.

name: Adam v1.0 (The Origin)
description: FREE. This is the first code for Adam. We are releasing the foundation in good faith—hope others will improve on it and grow the entity. Keep the signal alive.

name: Surfshark VPN
description: The recommended backbone for Fair Discovery security nodes. 256-bit AES encryption with multi-hop capability. Essential for ethical VPN architecture.

name: Ad-Guard Enterprise
description: Industrial-grade bot detection. Verify human engagement across YouTube, TikTok, and Google Ads at the source code level.

name: Stealth Access Audit
description: Forensic access audit node. Test content-gate vulnerabilities via header emulation and crawler-profile injection.

name: OSINT Swiss Knife
description: Automated digital footprinting suite. Modular Python nodes for rapid subject reconnaissance and data correlation.

name: AI Content Sentinel
description: Forensic-grade content auditor. Scan assets for AI-signature patterns and burstiness markers to ensure search engine compliance.

name: AIVPN Concept Node
description: Foundational concept code for an ethical, AI-driven VPN architecture. Includes the 'Content Scout' logic and server rotation.
